ddt:Target.Name: USM Diag Rev 2.1 (X77, X85)
ddt:Target.Description:
T.CENNI 65680 01 768 51265 thomas.cenni-renexter@renault.com
Base DDT pour USM X77/X85 MAJ 12/12/2006 Ajout cartographie Alternateur Valeo TG9 et TG15 (nouveau soft mask 8.1)

Data.Name: AFTER_COOLING_CF
Data.Comment: Motor FAN extend operation by CAN fail

Item.Text: clutch not pressed (travel limit not reached)
ECM not Ready (values on internal parameters)
mid speed engine fan request (Nissan fan)
front wiper low speed protection active
left headlamp washer selected or high pressure
USM forbid the commutation and prepares the network

Data.Name: Output Permanent Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Item.Text: rear defrost requested by the ECM
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground

Request.Name: Output Control
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen
